<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Traits\With; use Predis\Command\Command; /** * @mixin Command */ trait WithValues { public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $withValues = array_pop($arguments); if (is_bool($withValues) && $withValues) { $arguments[] = 'WITHVALUES'; } elseif (!is_bool($withValues)) { $arguments[] = $withValues; } parent::setArguments($arguments); } }
